paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently 6.66, with a 0.08% change from the prior close and a -25.81% change over the last 22 trading sessions. The stock has seen some recent movement, with one new news article in the last 24 hours.

The recent news article, from CoinCentral, reports that Fermi Inc's stock climbed after Siemens Energy turbines arrived for Project Matador, advancing its Texas AI power campus and gigawatt expansion plans. This development is likely driving the current news surrounding the company.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, as well as a filing regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has also been one Form 4 filing in the feed. Additionally, there have been four new social posts in the last 24 hours, including discussions of the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
